description: Intellifi develops asset identification and localization products using RFID and Bluetooth technologies. Its Brain product provides a web API for interacting with Intellifi devices and services, and the GitHub Pages domain also hosts static .NET SDK reference documentation.
summary: intellifi-nl.github.io publishes documentation for one REST/OpenAPI surface: the Intellifi Brain Web API, documented via GitHub Pages with a machine-readable OpenAPI YAML and supporting API-key or session-cookie authentication.
